title: Currently on 1.23
excerpt: Digging : tired, calm pups. Drinking : coffee with Baileys Caramel creamer (non-alcoholic) Eating : Chobani Strawberry greek yogurt Listening : Taylor Swift Channel on Pandora Wearing : Alice & Olivia zip hoodie, our Love Your Mother thermal, Lululemon pants…
body:
Digging: tired, calm pups.

Drinking: coffee with Baileys Caramel creamer (non-alcoholic) 

Eating: Chobani Strawberry greek yogurt 

Listening: Taylor Swift Channel on Pandora 

Wearing: Alice & Olivia zip hoodie, our Love Your Mother thermal, Lululemon pants 

Reading: magazines and Reeder on my iPad... I need a new amazing book. Any recommendations? 

Feeling: overwhelmed, but happy 

Weather: overcast, hoping it will warm up to 65 later like it did yesterday. 

Wanting: to grow and expand Amy Tangerine - there's some new and exciting things in the works. 

Needing: to decompress, relax, stay healthy 

Wishing: I had a few more answers. 

Thinking: my cart is full of new stuff at Two Peas and I should probably hit "buy" soon. 

Enjoying: various tweets, Instagrams, and notes that some of you are getting my book in the mail! 

Loving: sharing on this blog.

List of currents inspired by Tina - she mentioned my book in her last post and also has an awesome project in it.
